class.name: UtilityAIBTRandomSelector
class.brief_description: Executes its child nodes in random order until one of them succeeds (returning 1) or all of them fail (returning -1).
class.description: Executes its child nodes in random order until one of them succeeds (returning 1) or all of them fail (returning -1). If a child returns running (0) the selector will return running to its parent.
